macro.title: Airline CEOs urged by lawmaker to lower fares if fuel prices come down - CNBC
macro.summary: Airlines have raised airfare, fuel surcharges and baggage fees this year to help cover a surge in fuel costs since the Iran war started on Feb. 28.

macro.title: Europe has 'maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left', energy boss warns - BBC
macro.summary: Flights could soon be cancelled if supplies from the Gulf remain blocked, says the International Energy Agency.

macro.title: Stock futures inch higher following a record-setting day for S&P 500 and Nasdaq: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite climbed to new records as traders shook off worries about the Middle East conflict.

macro.title: Chip Foundry TSMC Beats First-Quarter Targets, Guides Up - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor beat estimates and guided higher than views for Q2.

macro.title: Cutting Prices on Doritos Has Paid Off, PepsiCo Says - WSJ
